title: Arknights origin furs
description: This mod adds the different models and visuals to the player for different origins according to the game Arknights.
body:
This mod adds different different models and visuals to the players based on the races from the game Arknights into minecraft using origin furs. So you can have different visuals to improve the immersion of the game expereince. Here are the races owing the unique visuals added into game:

- Archosauria
- Caprinae
- Cautus
- Elafia
- Feline
- Forte
- Kuranta
- Liberi
- Lupo
- Perro
- Phidia
- Sarkaz
- Savra
- Sankta
- Ursus
- Vouivre
- Vulpo
- Zalak
- Draco
- Manticore

If there are any issues about the mod or any bugs, please tell me.
